title: Events: Seminars and conferences
description: Here you can find a list of scientific seminars and events that are held at SLAC and Stanford. For science talks targeted to non-scientists, please visit the SLAC Public Lectures page. List of upcoming and past SLAC conferencesSite entry information
text: In a first-ever collaboration, three U.S. Department of Energy national laboratory light source facilities—the Advanced Light Source, the Linac Coherent Light Source, and the Stanford Synchrotron Radiation Lightsource—will come together for a joint users’ meeting, hosted at the SLAC National...
